_meta.description: Attribute Anomaly data: per-element base multipliers/proc structure, Disorder conversion rules (closed form) and Vortex conversion rules (Wind + second anomaly). Values cross-checked against the zenless-optimizer datamine (frzyc/genshin-optimizer libs/zzz, fetched 2026-07-03); in-game calibration status per entry in DOCS/sources.md Phase 5.
_meta.sources: DOCS/sources.md (Phase 5 section); frzyc/genshin-optimizer libs/zzz/formula/src/data/char/util.ts (anomalyMultipliers / disorderTimeMultipliers / vortexMultipliers)
_meta.conventions: mult is a fraction of ATK per hit/tick/proc (7.13 = 713%). 'hits' is the max number of procs over 'duration' seconds at 'interval' spacing (hits=1, interval=null for one-shot anomalies). supported=false entries are declared but rejected by calculations until values are measured. 'disorder' rules are the closed form measured by the community and datamined by the zenless-optimizer: total_mult = base + time_mult x max(0, window - elapsed_seconds) (+ any additive Disorder-mult buffs, e.g. Yuzuha M6). 'vortex' rules use the same closed form per INFUSED (non-wind) element with a 30s window; Vortex replaces Disorder while Windswept is active and deals the infused element's damage.

physical.name: Assault
physical.debuff_note: Inflicts stagger and increases Daze taken for a period (no direct damage-formula term).

ice.name: Shatter
ice.debuff_note: Freeze then Shatter; Frostbite increases CRIT DMG taken by direct hits (~+10%) while active - enter in direct-hit mode as an external CRIT DMG buff.

electric.name: Shock
electric.debuff_note: Procs when the enemy is hit; interrupts. Proc count/window provisional.

wind.name: Windswept
wind.debuff_note: One-shot burst + interrupt (zenless-optimizer datamine: 1250% ATK - PROVISIONAL until popup-checked with Velina; duration provisional too). Windswept STATE: direct Wind DMG taken +10% while active; the first non-Wind element to hit triggers that element's CONTAMINATION, extending the +10% to its direct DMG as well (once per Windswept). Enter these in direct-hit mode as 'DMG taken' entries (bracket PROVISIONAL). Velina M6: re-applying Windswept over itself boosts the new burst +2.5% per remaining second (max +40%) - enter as the Anomaly MV multiplier (up to 140).

disorder._note: Closed form from the zenless-optimizer datamine (2026-07-03), replacing the earlier procs/flat_decay model: total_mult = base + time_mult x max(0, window - elapsed_seconds since the REPLACED anomaly was applied). Damage is dealt as the REPLACED anomaly's element using the triggering agent's stats. PROVISIONAL until calibrated in-game (anomaly_plan.md 5e). The wind rule is Polarity Disorder (no time term).

vortex._note: Vortex: a second (non-Wind) anomaly applied over Windswept - or Windswept applied over an active anomaly - triggers Vortex INSTEAD of Disorder (no daze). Damage is dealt as the INFUSED element using the triggering agent's stats: total_mult = mult + time_mult x max(0, window - elapsed_seconds since the infused anomaly was applied) (+ additive Disorder/Vortex-mult buffs, e.g. Velina's consumed Windbite +150%, Yuzuha M6). Values from the zenless-optimizer datamine (2026-07-03) - PROVISIONAL until calibrated in-game with Velina. The target then enters the infused element's Contamination state.
